gsm8k_summary: In the controlled GSM8K n100 matrix, optimized CC-DFlash-R2 Light GPU was faster than Baseline-AR on average e2e time but slower than DFlash-R1.
qmsum_summary: In the controlled QMSum n30 runtime matrix, optimized CC-DFlash-R2 Light GPU completed all rows but did not beat Baseline-AR or DFlash-R1 on average e2e time.
